evidence: Great movie lots of action and spins in the plot. A great adventure comic movie we really enjoyed a ton.
I love it and I hate it... it's just that good. Excellent movie but really gruesome.
It's not a horror flick but it is gruesome in many parts. I get the meaning throughout the film, but it took me to about the last third of the movie to see what the director was trying to accomplish.
I thought this movie was so so.... the scenery was gorgeous and the special effects but I just couldn't get with the story.

summary: The user enjoys action and adventure films, often appreciating fast-paced storytelling. They show a mixed response to narrative complexity and production quality, indicating a preference for entertainment over deep emotional engagement.
